case_title: YELLOW CAB COOPERATIVE, INC. VS. CARMEN HERRARTE

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-01-2008 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF PRESENT. DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT HERRARTE, CARMEN

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF YELLOW CAB COOPERATIVE, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HERRARTE, CARMEN $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $159.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,659.00, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAR-11-2008, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT HERRARTE, CARMEN
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF YELLOW CAB COOPERATIVE, INC.
ORDER FOR AMENDED JUDGMENT RE: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING OF MAY 28, 2010

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING OF MAY-28-2010 - AMENDED JUDGMENT ISSUED. MR. WEINER PLAINTIFF'S REPRESENTATIVE AND DEFENDANT CARMEN HERRARTE ARE PRESENT. JUDGE JAMES J. MCBRIDE, CLERK SHAWNA VANTREE, REPORTER RITA HOWELL (206).
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY YELLOW CAB COOPERATIVE, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT HERRARTE, CARMEN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-01-2008 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT HERRARTE, CARMEN HEARING SET FOR JUN-13-2008 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY CARMEN HERRARTE ON JUN-13-2008 - DENIED. ALL PARTIES ARE PRESENT. PER THE PLAINTIFF, THE DEFENDANT'S INSURANCE COMPANY PAID JUDGMENT. NOT REPORTED. (506).
